sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9391" key="a)ntaisxu/nomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνταισχύνομαι</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ῡ]</foreign>, <sense id="n9391.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be ashamed in turn,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0532.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ach.Tat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
